title: lindsaea stortii
intro: Lindsaea stortii, also known as the forked spleenwort, is a species of fern in the family Lindsaeaceae. It is a type of medicinal plant used in traditional medicine, particularly in the treatment of various health conditions. The plant is known for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce swelling and combat infections. Herbal preparations of Lindsaea stortii include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat conditions such as fever, digestive issues, and skin problems.
